name: Wilding Word

spell.name: Wilding Word
spell.success: When the target attempts an attack roll or skill check that would harm you, it takes a –2 status penalty to its roll.
spell.failure: As success, but the target also becomes sickened 1 each time it damages you.
spell.critical_failure: As failure, but the sickened value is 2.

text: Your patron's majesty—or their displeasure—comes in a growl from your throat, making other creatures reluctant to harm you. The target must attempt a Will save; if the creature is an animal, fungus, or plant, it takes a –1 circumstance penalty to its save.
